Moots

Executive Summary

A distinguished legal professional with a robust foundation in civil, criminal, and corporate litigation, backed by experience at appellate courts.

Dedicated to advancing legal discourse through high-impact research, continuous moot court advocacy, and comprehensive regulatory analysis.

Education

Academic Excellence

B.B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) at VIT-AP University. Two-time recipient of the prestigious Academic Excellence Award (2024-25 & 2025-26).

8.65

CGPA / 10

Litigation

Practice & Strategy

Extensive exposure to civil and criminal proceedings before High Courts and District Courts. Proficient in legal drafting, SEBI regulations, and IPR framework analysis.

Publications

Published author and national presenter focusing on Data Privacy, AI Governance, Electoral Integrity, and Trade Secrets.

Leadership

Advocacy & Organizing

Spearheaded National Conferences and Intra Moot Courts. Recognized researcher in Constitutional and Public Health Law moots.

Tenure

Dec 2025 • 16 Weeks

Forum

AP High Court

Executive Brief

Collaborated directly with senior partners to manage civil and criminal litigation matters presented before the Hon'ble Andhra Pradesh High Court.

Detailed Contributions

  • Collaborated directly with senior partners to manage civil and criminal litigation matters presented before the Hon'ble Andhra Pradesh High Court and various subordinate courts.
  • Drafted critical legal documentation, including internal memos, formal legal notices, and court petitions, while conducting extensive pre-hearing case research.
  • Facilitated the case filing process and meticulously prepared documents for High Court submissions.
  • Actively participated in client meetings and internal case strategy discussions to align legal approaches with client objectives.
